title: CrazyTiger6's Resources
description: A resource pack I've been working on for fun, most notably including 3D models for many items!
body:
I have been working on a resource pack for fun, and felt others may want to see!

Within this pack is:
- 3D models for a few very flat blocks like Rails and Ladders
- A good selection of 3D models for items, currently including things like Apples, Totems of Undying, Potions, and more!
- Many mobs are being retextured, and their spawn eggs are being remodeled too!
- Every container in the game has had their GUIs retextured to be largely transparent and match the newly retextured hotbar!
- Retextures for a selection of blocks including Cobblestone and Bricks!
  
Progress can be seen on my BlueSky at [crazytiger6.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/crazytiger6.bsky.social)
